name_en: Top-tier replica M81551 Cross-grain Brown This classic cardholder showcases the delicate texture of Taïga leather, subtly highlighting the corner lettering. Card slots and interior pockets add functional details, and it fits into most pockets. Detailed features: 8 x 11 x 1 cm (Length x Height x Width)
